rationale: Full empirical sweep at 1733886e is clean. go build ./... exits 0. go test ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/setup: both ok. TestLifecycleOwnershipExactlyOneWorkflowClaimant found in internal/lifecycle/*_test.go and PASSes standalone. AC9 greps: 'impl approve' in ADR-0037 = 5 (>=1); 'closed without' in internal/setup/claude.go = 2, .claude/skills/ms-impl-approve/SKILL.md = 2, .agents/skills/ms-impl-approve/SKILL.md = 2 (all >=1). gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty. go vet ./internal/setup ./internal/lifecycle clean. golangci-lint run on both packages: 0 issues (no misspell). mindspec validate spec 115-impl-approve-panel-gate: all checks passed. Fences: BranchExistsE/show-ref 0-hit in the bead-3 diff; git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ empty. git diff --stat 2f45d8d9..1733886e touches exactly the 5 expected files (198 insertions, 0 deletions, no OWNERSHIP.yaml edit); git status --porcelain shows only the untracked reviews dir. Read ownership_test.go: it globs ALL .mindspec/domains/*/OWNERSHIP.yaml, fails on zero manifests (guards vacuous truth), fails if claimant count != 1, and fails if the sole claimant isn't 'workflow' — genuinely RED-on-revert for both a second claimant and a reverted workflow claim. Also ran the broader regression go test ./internal/setup ./cmd/mindspec: both ok, no breakage from the doc/literal edits.
findings: mindspec validate spec 115-impl-approve-panel-gate — all checks passed
BranchExistsE/show-ref grep over bead-3 diff — 0 hits
git diff --stat 2f45d8d9..1733886e — exactly 5 files, 198 insertions(+), 0 deletions(-), no OWNERSHIP.yaml touched
git status --porcelain — only untracked reviews/spec-115-bead3/ dir
ownership_test.go manually reviewed: globs all domain manifests, fails on 0 manifests (non-vacuous), fails if claimant count != 1, fails if sole claimant != workflow — genuinely discriminating
